John F. Kennedy, Hubert Humphrey, Estes Kefauver

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?candidate ?candidateLabel WHERE {
  VALUES ?candidate {
    wd:Q216 wd:Q158 wd:Q31451
  }
  ?candidate rdfs:label ?candidateLabel .
  FILTER(LANGMATCHES(LANG(?candidateLabel) , "en"))
}
```
